elements.name: Verify presence of header elements for a Guest user

steps.name: I am navigating the page as a "guest" user
the "Contact Us email" should be displayed
the "contact phone number" should be displayed
the "VAT toggle" should be displayed
the "Sign In button" should be displayed
the "user name" should not be displayed
the "Sign Out button" should not be displayed
I am on the "home" page
I click on the "Branch Finder" icon
I should be redirected to the "branches" page
I am on the "home" page
I click on the "Download Catalogue" icon
I should be redirected to the "technical-documents" page
I am on the "home" page
I click on the "Basket" icon
I should be redirected to the "basket" page

elements.name: Verify search box functionality for existing products

steps.name: I am on the "home" page
I fill in the "Search bar" input field with "plant trailer"
I click on the "magnifier glass" element
I should be redirected to the "search" page
the "title" should contain the text "plant trailer"
the "products cards" should be displayed

elements.name: Verify search box functionality for existing products

steps.name: I am on the "home" page
I fill in the "Search bar" input field with "ISPJ001"
I click on the "magnifier glass" element
I should be redirected to the "search" page
the "title" should contain the text "ISPJ001"
the "products cards" should be displayed

elements.name: Verify search box functionality for non-existing products

steps.name: I am on the "home" page
I fill in the "Search bar" input field with "non existent product"
I click on the "magnifier glass" element
I should be redirected to the "search" page
the "title" should contain the text "non existent product"
the "products amount" should contain the text "0"
